commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Control UI extraction and rendering for nested and streamed tool-result image blocks, preserves data image URLs, expands related UI tests, and includes small test/config/import cleanup.

PR surface: Source +168, Tests +277, Other -3. Total +442 across 35 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows tool cards extract only text from toolresult content and streamed tool messages only emit text toolresults, so image blocks in those paths are dropped before rendering.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No automated code repair is needed; maintainers should decide whether to land this scoped branch or consolidate it with the related direct inline image work.

target.title: feat(ui): render image blocks in tool output cards
target.body:
## Summary
- Render `image` content blocks from tool results in Control UI tool cards.
- Preserve streamed tool result images as message-level image blocks so expanded tool details do not duplicate the same image.
- Preserve pre-encoded `data:image/...` URLs in streamed tool result images instead of wrapping them a second time.
- Rebased the PR onto current `main`; no dependency or lockfile changes are included.
- Reset the usage cache status test locale so the changed UI test lane stays deterministic after localized tests run.

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Tool output messages with `image` content blocks were invisible in Control UI tool cards, and streamed image blocks with pre-encoded data URLs could be normalized into broken double-prefixed data URLs.
- **Real environment tested:** Linux x86_64, Node v22.22.0, current PR worktree `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-87548`, dev gateway on `http://127.0.0.1:19051` with token auth.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
  - `pnpm exec tsx /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-87548-evidence/proof-tool-image-render.mjs`
  - `pnpm exec vitest run ui/src/ui/app-tool-stream.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.test.ts`
  - `pnpm exec vitest run ui/src/ui/usage-cache-status.test.ts`
  - `pnpm check:test-types`
  - `pnpm test:changed`
  - `pnpm check:changed`
  - `OPENCLAW_REPO=/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-87548 OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT=19051 OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN=mytoken123 OPENCLAW_LOG=/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-87548-evidence/dev-gateway.log OPENCLAW_DEV_PID_FILE=/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-87548-evidence/dev-gateway.pid /media/vdc/code/ai/Hermes/scripts/dev-gateway-start.sh`
  - Browser proof: opened `http://127.0.0.1:19051/chat#token=mytoken123`, verified the chat UI loaded, sent `请只回复 OK`, then stopped the run after confirming the message appeared in the chat log.
- **Evidence after fix:**
  ```json
[
  {
    "id": "tool:call-image",
    "name": "image_gen.generate",
    "args": {
      "prompt": "chart"
    },
    "inputText": "{\n  \"prompt\": \"chart\"\n}",
    "outputText": "Generated image",
    "images": [
      "https://example.com/generated.png"
    ]
  }
]
  ```
  Control UI connected successfully after launching the current PR worktree gateway; screenshots captured at `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-87548-evidence/control-ui-chat-ready.png`, `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-87548-evidence/control-ui-chat-message-sent.png`, and `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-87548-evidence/control-ui-chat-stopped.png`. The focused app-tool-stream regression also verifies that direct `data:image/png;base64,...`, `source.base64` data URLs, and raw base64 image data normalize to the expected image URLs.
- **Observed result after fix:** The extracted tool card contains `outputText: "Generated image"` and `images: ["https://example.com/generated.png"]`; streamed image blocks preserve existing data URLs instead of producing `data:image/...;base64,data:image/...`; the browser proof confirms the rebuilt Control UI from this branch connects to the dev gateway and renders the chat surface.
- **What was not tested:** Did not invoke a live third-party image generation provider; the proof uses the same tool-result content shape that image-producing tools emit. The live chat smoke was stopped before model completion after verifying the UI accepted and displayed the message.

## Regression Test Plan
- **Target test file:** `ui/src/ui/app-tool-stream.node.test.ts`, `ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.node.test.ts`, `ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.test.ts`, `ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts`, `ui/src/ui/usage-cache-status.test.ts`.
- Added coverage for streamed tool result images, nested image blocks inside tool results, direct rendering of multiple tool card images, managed outgoing URL filtering, avoiding duplicate rendering for message-level streamed images, and preserving pre-encoded data image URLs in streamed results.
- Stabilized the usage cache status unit test by resetting the active i18n locale to English before asserting English copy.

## Root Cause
- **Root cause:** The tool card builder only extracted text from tool result content arrays and ignored `image` blocks. The streamed image extractor also wrapped every `data` field as raw base64, even when it was already a valid `data:image/...` URL.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt
